reproduction.note: All headline artifact numbers reproduce exactly or within engine-set rounding.

preregistration_check.bucket_boundary: [0.50,0.53) IS genuinely pre-registered: it is the frozen hi-qhat bucket of 2026-07-10 FINAL-DESIGN.md S4.2 (p_eff in [.50,.53]), the S7 day-60 cap-verdict zone, and cap55_shadow exists to settle it. NOT a fresh scan winner. Merge agent's K=13 bucket-selection concern is answered.
preregistration_check.replication_direction: fillable q .4516 vs unfillable .7692 is on the written Jul-10 record (FINAL-DESIGN.md line 87). BUT the same paragraph records verify-regime finding the OPPOSITE sign (expensive fills win more, z=1.86) and labels it an 'unresolved contradiction' - so a one-sided test is generous; two-sided Fisher p=0.0205. The misses analyst separately disclosed the overlapping cap53-miss cell was best-of-7 (honest adjusted ~0.09).
preregistration_check.train_test: No candle-fit choices; live-ledger only. No TEST contamination found.

fatal_correction_cluster_weighting.problem: trades cluster: up to 12 engines fill the SAME (t0,side). The pooled -6.26c is trade-weighted; losing intervals carry more engines (q by cluster size: 1->0.5548 n=155, 2->0.431, 4->0.370). Block bootstrap fixes the SE, not the weighting of the point estimate.
fatal_correction_cluster_weighting.reading: interval-level 50-53c EV = -2.63c/share [CI -6.67,+1.12], p=0.089 - statistically indistinguishable from the -2.75c mechanical cost drag (1c slip + ~1.75c fee) that the frozen model predicts for ANY no-edge fill at ~51c.

null_misspecification.problem: p=0.0115 tests EV<0, but EV<0 is the NULL expectation under zero edge (costs alone). The distinctive claim - adverse selection beyond costs - tests q < ask-implied prob (entry-0.01).
null_misspecification.reading: adverse-selection increment: -3.51c trade-weighted (p=0.097), -1.74c cluster-level (p=0.24). No bucket in the fair scan shows significant adverse selection (best p=0.099 at 55-60c, K=8).

stability.reading: a pre-registrable alternative split does NOT reproduce the strong effect in both halves; the negativity concentrates in even UTC days. Era split (pre -9.2 / v3 -7.2) is stabler but each era CI individually includes 0.

what_survives.fee_dead_weak_form: TRUE and reproduced: no evidence q clears q* anywhere in 50-53c (trade-wt Wilson upper .5125 < q*=.5282; cluster-level q .5019 < q*=.5272). Buying there without positive evidence is -2.6 to -6c/share realized. Capping flat arms below 0.50 remains a defensible cost-avoidance default.
what_survives.v3_action_targets: reversal_v2+impulse50+impulse_v2 at 50-53c: n=29 trades/16 intervals, q=.345, EV -18c/share - direction supports the action but sample is tiny.
what_survives.capmiss_signal: 10/12 cap-missed wins (Fisher one-sided p=0.016, two-sided 0.021, reproduced) is the strongest independent piece; direction on the Jul-10 written record, but n=12 and the overlapping best-of-7 scan version self-adjusts to ~0.09.
what_survives.direct_contrast: lt50 vs ge50 diff +11.8c, CI [-4.8,+27.6], p=0.079 - the decision-relevant contrast for CAP-DOWN is NOT significant.

multiplicity_accounting.cells_in_source_artifacts: ~60 calibration cells (q2: 13 pooled + up/down/family/era views) + 5 followup capzones + 10 ev_bucket segments + ~35 disclosed misses comparisons; R2 rests on the pre-registered zone so full-scan Bonferroni does not apply to the zone choice itself; Bonferroni x13 on the bucket-scan reading would give p=0.13.
multiplicity_accounting.invalid_check_note: the label-shuffle permutation in verify_r2.py is invalid (global shuffle destroys price calibration, making expensive buckets auto-negative); disregard selection.perm_frac_minp_scan_beats_obs.

corrected_effect: 50-53c pooled, interval-weighted: -2.6c/share (CI [-6.7,+1.1], p=0.089) - consistent with pure cost drag, no demonstrated adverse selection. Zone still shows no evidence of clearing fees (q_upper < q* holds), so CAP-DOWN on flat arms stays defensible as a default, but the claimed -6.3 to -9.2c/share of avoidable adverse selection is not established; the significant headline p=0.0115 is an artifact of multi-engine pile-in weighting against a strawman null.
